title: Global Item Limiter
description: You Can Limit Any Item Using Simple Commands
body:
Using Global Item Limiter You Can Limit Any Item To Any Value!

Commands:
Reset Item Limit
  /itemlimitreset

Reset SPECIFIC Item Limit
  /itemlimitreset <item>

Add Item Limit
  /itemlimit <item> <limit>

DO NOT PUT "minecraft:" INFRON OF <item>. IT'LL NOT WORK.
